title: The Best Egg Salad
description: This classic egg salad recipe is easy to make and perfect for egg salad sandwiches — mashed yolks and mayo with chopped egg whites, green onion, celery, and fresh dill.
instructions: Cut the eggs in half. Remove the yolks and place them in a bowl or a shallow dish. Finely chop the egg whites.
Using a fork, mash the egg yolks with mayonnaise, mustard, and a pinch of salt and pepper until smooth and creamy.
Add the chopped egg whites, green onion, celery, and dill. Stir well. Taste and season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
Serve on bread or over lettuce.

notes.label: To Hard Boil Eggs
notes.text: Place eggs in a saucepan and cover with water ½-inch above the eggs. Bring to a rolling boil over high heat. Remove from the heat and let stand covered for 15–17 minutes (for large eggs). Transfer the eggs to a bowl of ice water for 5 minutes.

notes.label: Storage
notes.text: Store leftover egg salad in a covered container in the fridge for up to 4 days.
